name: Anthropic
steps: Create an account or sign in
Add a payment method (credit purchase required for API access)
Click "Create Key", name it, and copy the key (starts with sk-ant-...)
Paste it above and click "Validate & Save"
notes: Paid only. Tier 1 requires $5 credit purchase. Rate limits increase with spend ($40→Tier2, $200→Tier3). Prompt caching available for up to 90% savings on cached tokens.
